positive: A highly intricate, symmetrical bioluminescent floral mandala design. The central focus is a bouquet of stylized cosmic flora, featuring interlocking vines, glowing stylized crescent moons, and celestial flowers, rendered in a neo-traditional tattoo illustration style mixed with a detailed woodcut print aesthetic. Color palette must utilize deep indigo, midnight blue, emerald green, and high-contrast gold accents to simulate bioluminescence. The composition must be perfectly centered, ensuring clean, sharp silhouettes against a dark, solid background. Focus on extreme detail, precise linework, and strong contrast, suitable for a wearable art patch or apparel print.
